name: SBG Funding
description_short: SBG Funding provides flexible small business loans up to $5M with same-day funding decisions and rates starting at 1.75%/month across multiple financing types.
description_long:
SBG Funding operates as a small business lending platform focused on providing quick access to capital for business owners. The company positions itself as an alternative to traditional banks, emphasizing speed and flexibility in the lending process. Their website indicates they serve as leaders in small business growth funding with a stated mission to understand and serve small business needs.

The company offers multiple financing products including SBA 7(a) loans (up to $10M, 6 months to 7 years), Equipment Financing (1-10 year terms, up to 100% equipment value), Bridge Capital/lines of credit (up to $750K, 6-24 month terms), Small Business Term Loans, Small Business Lines of Credit, Invoice Financing, and HELOC products. They market industry-specific solutions for construction, restaurants, healthcare, HVAC, manufacturing, trucking, automotive services, beauty, wellness, retail, and veterinary practices.

SBG Funding distinguishes itself through promised same-day funding upon approval, decisions within 24 hours, no prepayment penalties across products, and rates stated as low as 1.75%/month. They emphasize mobile-friendly application processes and claim applicants can complete applications without impacting credit scores. The company provides a funding calculator and maintains a customer login portal, suggesting an established customer base.

While the website presents attractive terms and customer testimonials, the company's actual underwriting standards, approval rates, and whether advertised rates are achievable by typical applicants remain unclear from available information. The stated rates (1.75%/month = 21%+ APR) are relatively high compared to traditional bank small business loans, though competitive within the alternative lending space. Limited transparency exists regarding fees, eligibility requirements, or the percentage of applicants receiving best-advertised rates.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Same-day funding available once approved; funding within 24 hours of approval
Fast approval decisions within 24 hours for multiple product types
High loan amounts available—up to $5M in general, $10M for SBA 7(a) loans
No prepayment penalties across all advertised products
Multiple financing options including SBA 7(a), equipment financing, bridge capital, and lines of credit
Industry-specific lending programs for 10+ business categories (construction, restaurants, healthcare, trucking, etc.)
Mobile-friendly application process completable on phone
cons: Advertised rates starting at 1.75%/month (21%+ APR) are relatively expensive compared to traditional bank loans, with no transparency on what rate typical applicants receive
Website lacks detailed eligibility requirements, credit score minimums, or time-in-business requirements needed for approval
No fee schedule disclosed; unclear what origination fees, prepayment fees, or other charges may apply
Limited transparency on approval rates or percentage of applicants receiving advertised best rates
Application claims 'will not impact your credit score' but does not explain if this means no hard pull or a soft inquiry
best_for: Small business owners needing capital urgently and willing to pay premium rates for speed (same-day funding)
Companies in niche industries (restaurants, HVAC, trucking, construction) where traditional bank lending is slower or more restrictive
Businesses seeking equipment financing with flexible terms and 100% loan-to-value coverage
Existing customers seeking credit line increases (line increase eligibility stated every 60 days)
diagnosis: SBG Funding is best for small business owners who need capital quickly and can afford higher-than-bank rates in exchange for same-day funding decisions and flexible underwriting. The main caveat is that advertised rates (1.75%/month+) are substantially higher than traditional bank business loans, and actual approval rates and achievable rates for typical applicants are not disclosed.
services: Equipment Financing (1-10 year terms, up to 100% equipment value)
SBA 7(a) Loans (up to $10M, 6 months to 7 years)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
